brand.name: Raibi Jamila World Cup 2026 Edition
brand.vibe: Raw cultural pride meets global stage energy, Apple-level polish with Nike World Cup campaign energy in Casablanca medinas.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none

layout_sections.name: Header
layout_sections.description: Sticky nav with multi-language toggle (FR/AR/EN) and glassmorphism effect.
layout_sections.styles: fixed w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10

layout_sections.name: Hero Cinematic
layout_sections.description: Parallax floating product cup. Double exposure Mosque-Stadium background.
layout_sections.styles: relative min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-black
layout_sections.interactions: Cup rotates and drifts on scroll. Smoke effect via Framer Motion or background texture.

layout_sections.name: The Journey (Horizontal Scroll)
layout_sections.description: Scroll-triggered horizontal timeline comparing Marrakech streets to US stadiums.
layout_sections.interactions: Sticky container pins while content moves horizontally. Counter increments to 8,000 km.

layout_sections.name: La Saveur (Product Close-Up)
layout_sections.description: Macro view of product with AR-style ingredient callouts.
layout_sections.interactions: Tilt effect on mousemove/scroll. Hotspots reveal zellige pattern and pomegranate splash.

layout_sections.name: When Lions Roar
layout_sections.description: Crowd celebration section with interactive Audio Visualizer.
layout_sections.styles: relative min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden
layout_sections.interactions: Click 'Feel the Roar' -> requests microphone -> displays D3/Canvas waveform synced to audio volume in red/green. Loud noise triggers confetti.

layout_sections.name: Limited Edition 3D
layout_sections.description: 3D-like rotating presentation of the World Cup edition cup and QR scan.

buttons.primary: bg-crimson text-white font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-magenta transition-colors duration-300 tracking-wide uppercase
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-gold text-gold font-bold px-8 py-4 hover:bg-gold/10 transition-colors uppercase
buttons.icon_button: p-3 rounded-full bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white backdrop-blur-md transition-all

cards.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 p-8 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

rules.scroll: Use Lenis for premium smooth scroll feel.
rules.parallax: Use framer-motion useScroll and useTransform for element parallax.
rules.transitions: Use 'paper tear' SVG masks for section transitions.
rules.hover: Scale slightly (1.02) and increase border opacity on interactive elements.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on magenta/crimson meets APCA contrast. Use dark overlays on busy backgrounds.
